title: More Pylons
description: Adds new powerful and utility-focused Pylons to expand the original Pylons mod
body:
![More Pylons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/424d119f20c12082b1ce699a424e9dffa93b2ad9_0.webp)

**Adds new pylons – feel free to suggest new ones in the comments!**

**Current Pylons:**

- XP Pylon – Stores and generates XP. Produces 1 mB of essence per tick, reaching 1,395 XP (about 30 levels) in roughly 21 minutes.
  
![XP Pylon Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c890a13e1c98f0ed722cd1ec3653d50340165ed9.png)

- Thermo Pylon – Generates energy from nearby lava/heat, Stores 400KFE
  
![Thermo Pylon Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f432869b1d17e9f5c01b28c6867e90963f24f96d.png)

![Magma Core Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88cba338d2fa786a59963893e6b9d722087da30a.png)

- Energy Cube Pylon – Stores 1,400KFE
  
- Lava Tank Pylon – Stores  32 buckets of lava
  
![Lava Tank Pylon Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c8ff6825e2157bd5fa6878ce70f02b2a9f01ce8.png)

- Water Tank Pylon – Stores  32 buckets of water
  
![Water Tank Pylon Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dccd6322b19b0a712285af978239dfba4e568e3.png)

- Dye Pylon – Generates 1 dye of each color every 1 minute <3

![Dye Pylon Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e8c5ef3b003fa2234557ed41dbfcb2b7478d015.png)


**Coming Soon:**

- Mob Smiter Pylon – Attacks mobs in an area
- Teleport Pylon – Allows teleportation from one pylon to another


**Discord: angel_mp4**
